title: Crispy White Fish Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful dish combining crispy white fish with a variety of ingredients. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the white fish fillets on the baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, toast the Syrian crispy flatbread.
Assemble the bowls by placing a piece of fish on each plate.
Top with incredibly crispy lettuce, a bowl of fresh tomatoes, and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
